name: Omai Gold Mines Corp.
description: Omai Gold Mines Corp. is a junior gold explorer focused on the 4,590-acre Omai Gold Project in Guyana's Potaro Mining District, adjacent to G2 Goldfields' Oko-Ghanie project. The company is in the advanced exploration stage with significant resource definition drilling underway, reporting a market capitalization of approximately C$1.2 billion as of April 2026.
